languages.text: "Я пока не совсем понимаю, что значит "влияние" и как его зарабатывают. Думаю, поучиться у тех, кто в этом разбирается, будет здравым решением".
"I'm still not sure what 'influence' is, nor how you get it. It seems only wise to learn from those who actually understand it."
languages.original_text: "Я пока не совсем понимаю, что значит "влияние" и как его зарабатывают. Думаю, поучиться у тех, кто в этом разбирается, будет здравым решением".

traits.locale_text: "I'm still not sure what 'influence' is or how you get it. It seems only right to take a lesson from those who actually possess such expertise."
"I'm still not sure what 'influence' is, nor how you get it. It seems only wise to learn from those who actually understand it."
"Use the power of the most influential family? Well, it was Seberian's power that once saved the 32nd from their unenviable fate as cannon fodder."
"I'm still not sure what 'influence' is or how you get it. It seems only right to take a lesson from those who actually possess such expertise."
"I'm still not sure what 'influence' is, nor how you get it. It seems only wise to learn from those who actually understand it."

languages.text: 「最も影響力のある家族の力を利用するのか？かつてはシベリアンの力こそが、32番隊を悲惨な砲弾の餌食の運命から救ったのだ」
languages.original_text: "Use the power of the most influential family? Well, it was Seberian's power that once saved the 32nd from their unenviable fate as cannon fodder."

languages.text: "Hâlâ 'nüfuz' nedir ya da nasıl elde edilir emin değilim. Bunu gerçekten anlayanlardan öğrenmek, en akıllıcası gibi görünüyor."
languages.original_text: "I'm still not sure what 'influence' is, nor how you get it. It seems only wise to learn from those who actually understand it."

traits.locale_text: "Hâlâ 'nüfuz' nedir ya da nasıl elde edilir emin değilim. Bunu gerçekten anlayanlardan öğrenmek, en akıllıcası gibi görünüyor."

languages.text: “我还是不明白‘影响力’到底是什么，更不知该怎么得到它。向那些真正懂行的人学习，似乎才是明智之举。”
languages.original_text: "I'm still not sure what 'influence' is, nor how you get it. It seems only wise to learn from those who actually understand it."

traits.locale_text: “我还是不明白‘影响力’到底是什么，更不知该怎么得到它。向那些真正懂行的人学习，似乎才是明智之举。”

languages.text: "Ich weiß immer noch nicht genau, was 'Einfluss' ist und wie man ihn erlangt. Es erscheint mir nur klug, von jenen zu lernen, die es wissen."
languages.original_text: "I'm still not sure what 'influence' is, nor how you get it. It seems only wise to learn from those who actually understand it."

traits.locale_text: "Ich weiß immer noch nicht genau, was 'Einfluss' ist und wie man ihn erlangt. Es erscheint mir nur klug, von jenen zu lernen, die es wissen."

languages.text: « Je peine toujours à comprendre ce qu'est l'influence ou comment en acquérir. Autant me rapprocher des influents pour apprendre. »
languages.original_text: "I'm still not sure what 'influence' is, nor how you get it. It seems only wise to learn from those who actually understand it."

traits.locale_text: « Je peine toujours à comprendre ce qu'est l'influence ou comment en acquérir. Autant me rapprocher des influents pour apprendre. »

languages.text: «Aún no tengo claro lo que es la "influencia" ni cómo obtenerla. Parece sensato descubrirlo de boca de alguien que la comprende».
languages.original_text: "I'm still not sure what 'influence' is, nor how you get it. It seems only wise to learn from those who actually understand it."

traits.locale_text: «Aún no tengo claro lo que es la "influencia" ni cómo obtenerla. Parece sensato descubrirlo de boca de alguien que la comprende».
